headline: Strategy, Coinbase, and Robinhood Stocks Surge. This Market Is Getting Weirder.
summary: Strategy Coinbase  and  Robinhood  stocks are, in fact, among the best performers in premarket trading.  Strategy, the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, was jumping more than 7%—crypto exchange Coinbase rose 6% and trading platform Robinhood was 4% higher.  The price of Bitcoin surged to $71,269 early in the day, up close to 7% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinDesk data.

headline: Coinbase, Other Crypto Stocks Surge. What’s Behind the Rally.

Strategy, the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, was jumping more than 7.8%—crypto exchange Coinbase rose 9.6% and trading platform Robinhood was 5.6% higher.  The price of Bitcoin surged to $71,269 early in the day, up close to 7% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinDesk data.

headline: Crypto Stocks Strategy, Coinbase, and Circle Jump in Premarket Trading Wednesday
summary: Crypto-linked equities are surging in premarket trading Wednesday morning. Strategy (Nasdaq: MSTR) is up 6.7%, Coinbase (Nasdaq: COIN) is up 5.6%, and Circle (NYSE: CRCL) is up 2.9% as of 7:55 AM ET, with Bitcoin providing the fuel for all three moves. headline: Why Coinbase (COIN) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of blockchain infrastructure company Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) jumped 15.2% in the afternoon session after reports revealed that U.S. President Donald Trump met with CEO Brian Armstrong and publicly supported the company on a major crypto bill, while a broad rally in cryptocurrencies also lifted sentiment.

content.title: Why Coinbase (COIN) Stock Is Trading Up Today
content.summary: Shares of blockchain infrastructure company Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) jumped 15.2% in the afternoon session after reports revealed that U.S. President Donald Trump met with CEO Brian Armstrong and publicly supported the company on a major crypto bill, while a broad rally in cryptocurrencies also lifted sentiment.
